CAT04-031.headline: How Body Image Shapes Self-Worth
CAT04-031.subtitle: how body image affects mental health and self-worth
CAT04-031.figureLine: A single seated clay figure rests one open hand softly against its own chest, posture quiet and self-accepting, conveying a gentle return to inner worth.
CAT04-031.sceneLine: A soft violet-accented mirror-form beside the figure holds a calm, undistorted reflection in pale violet, suggesting a steadier and kinder way of seeing oneself.

CAT04-032.headline: Body Dysmorphia Vs Dissatisfaction
CAT04-032.subtitle: where the line between concern and disorder lies
CAT04-032.figureLine: A single standing clay figure tilts its head thoughtfully, one hand raised as if weighing two unseen things, posture reflective and discerning.
CAT04-032.sceneLine: Two adjacent violet-accent forms rest at slightly different scales beside the figure, one soft light violet and one fuller, suggesting a subtle threshold being carefully considered.

CAT04-033.headline: How Social Media Distorts Body Image
CAT04-033.subtitle: the filter effect on how we see ourselves
CAT04-033.figureLine: A single clay figure leans slightly toward a faint glow, posture drawn in and a little uncertain, conveying the quiet pull of comparison.
CAT04-033.sceneLine: A pane of pale violet ripples and warps a smooth violet-accent shape passing behind it, suggesting a true form gently bent out of shape by a filtering layer.

CAT04-034.headline: Male Body Image And Muscle Dysmorphia
CAT04-034.subtitle: when men feel never strong enough
CAT04-034.figureLine: A single broad-shouldered clay figure stands tensed and squared, posture braced as if guarding against an impossible measure it cannot reach.
CAT04-034.sceneLine: A violet-accent benchmark line hovers always just above the figure's reach in soft light violet, receding slightly higher as it rises, suggesting a standard that keeps moving away.

CAT04-035.headline: Body Neutrality
CAT04-035.subtitle: an alternative to body positivity
CAT04-035.figureLine: A single clay figure stands relaxed and evenly balanced, arms loose at its sides, posture calm and unhurried, conveying peace that needs no verdict.
CAT04-035.sceneLine: A level, gently glowing pale violet horizon rests in steady equilibrium beside the figure, neither rising nor falling, suggesting acceptance held in quiet balance.

CAT04-036.headline: How Diet Culture Damages Self-Worth
CAT04-036.subtitle: the mental health cost of diet culture
CAT04-036.figureLine: A single clay figure gently sets down a heavy unseen weight from its shoulders, posture beginning to straighten, conveying release from an imposed pressure.
CAT04-036.sceneLine: Tight violet-accent constricting bands beside the figure loosen and soften into pale violet, suggesting rigid rules quietly easing their grip.

CAT04-037.headline: Exercise Addiction
CAT04-037.subtitle: when compulsive movement harms body image
CAT04-037.figureLine: A single clay figure pauses mid-stride and rests one hand on its knee, posture catching its breath, conveying a needed stop within relentless motion.
CAT04-037.sceneLine: A tightening violet-accent loop beside the figure slows and opens into a softer pale violet arc, suggesting a driven cycle finding room to rest.

CAT04-038.headline: Body Image Across Cultures
CAT04-038.subtitle: different ideals, same psychological impact
CAT04-038.figureLine: A single clay figure stands calmly at the center, posture open and steady, conveying one shared human experience held across many settings.
CAT04-038.sceneLine: Several differently shaped violet-accent forms encircle the figure in varied soft light violet tones, suggesting many cultural ideals surrounding one common feeling.

CAT04-039.headline: Aging And Body Image
CAT04-039.subtitle: navigating physical changes with self-compassion
CAT04-039.figureLine: A single clay figure stands serene with one hand resting gently over the other, posture settled and dignified, conveying tenderness toward a changing self.
CAT04-039.sceneLine: A pale violet form beside the figure softens its edges and gains gentle rings of soft light violet, suggesting graceful change met with quiet acceptance.

CAT08-033.headline: Emotional Eating
CAT08-033.subtitle: using food to manage difficult feelings
CAT08-033.figureLine: A single clay figure sits with both hands cupped softly in its lap, posture inward and self-soothing, conveying comfort sought during hard feelings.
CAT08-033.sceneLine: A swirl of soft light violet feeling-forms gathers near the figure's chest and gradually settles into calm pale violet, suggesting emotions gently understood rather than filled.

CAT10-005.headline: How Instagram And TikTok Harm Body Image
CAT10-005.subtitle: the body-image cost of social feeds
CAT10-005.figureLine: A single clay figure sits curled slightly toward a small distant glow, posture absorbed and quietly worn, conveying the slow toll of endless scrolling.
CAT10-005.sceneLine: An endless ribbon of pale violet rectangular forms streams downward past the figure in soft light violet, suggesting a feed that never stops feeding comparison.

CAT19-007.headline: The Rise Of Muscle Dysmorphia
CAT19-007.subtitle: male body image issues and muscle dysmorphia
CAT19-007.figureLine: A single clay figure stands with arms held rigidly tense, posture striving and unsatisfied, conveying a relentless inward pressure to be more.
CAT19-007.sceneLine: A violet-accent target ring beside the figure keeps drawing inward to an ever-smaller pale violet center, suggesting a goal that never lets the figure arrive.

CAT19-026.headline: When Fitness Becomes Compulsion
CAT19-026.subtitle: exercise addiction and compulsive movement
CAT19-026.figureLine: A single clay figure stops in place and lets its shoulders soften downward, posture finally allowing stillness, conveying rest reclaimed from compulsion.
CAT19-026.sceneLine: A spinning violet-accent wheel of forms beside the figure gradually slows to a calm pale violet halt, suggesting a driven momentum gently coming to rest.

CAT19-042.headline: Why Eating Disorders In Men Go Undiagnosed
CAT19-042.subtitle: overlooked struggles with food in men
CAT19-042.figureLine: A single clay figure stands half-turned into shadow, one hand lifting as if quietly asking to be seen, posture overlooked yet reaching.
CAT19-042.sceneLine: A faint pale violet form rests in dim shadow beside the figure as a soft light violet glow begins to reach it, suggesting an unseen struggle finally being noticed.

CAT20-063.headline: Chronic Illness And Body Image
CAT20-063.subtitle: finding self-acceptance when the body changes
CAT20-063.figureLine: A single clay figure sits with one hand resting gently and protectively over its midsection, posture tender and steady, conveying care for a changed body.
CAT20-063.sceneLine: A pale violet form beside the figure shifts to a new shape while a soft light violet glow holds steadily around it, suggesting steadiness and acceptance amid change.
